title: ConvAgent: An Agentic Framework for Conversational Search via Contextualized Reasoning and Reinforcement Learning

defines.name: ConvAgent
defines.definition: An agentic conversational search framework that interleaves search and reasoning across turns using reinforcement learning with tailored rewards.

problem: Existing conversational search systems rely on static rewrite-retrieve-generate pipelines or single-turn deep search agents, which do not adequately handle evolving multi-turn user intent, search-result utilization, and mixed-initiative interaction.
